ground_truth.description: Clearly a photo of Cape Byron Bay lighthouse, taken from back looking over ocean.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Clearly a photo of the Cape Byron Bay lighthouse. Photo is taken from the back looking over the ocean. You can see crenellated parapets (castle-like decorative elements) and a pathway with railing leading to the lighthouse. It should be able to get this, especially with the metadata. Daytime, clear weather.

details.description: A prominent white lighthouse stands on a rugged coastal headland at golden hour. The cylindrical, tapering tower has a black cornice ring below a lantern room with metal gallery, glazing, and a small weather vane on top. At the base sits a low white annex with crenellated parapets. A paved pedestrian path with white railings curves up the ridge toward the lighthouse, with visitors along the walkway. Below, a rocky cliff drops to the ocean; a small lookout platform is visible on the lower slope near the sea. The sky is clear and the light is warm, casting long shadows across the grass and rock.

details.description: A bright white cylindrical lighthouse with a lantern room sits atop a grassy, rocky headland edging the sea. A white-railed walkway and stairs wind up toward the lighthouse from the foreground. The tower has a dark band around the lantern gallery and a small observation deck around the top. The scene is lit by warm late-afternoon sun, with a clear blue sky and calm ocean stretching to the horizon, indicating Cape Byron on the Byron Bay headland, NSW, Australia.

details.description: A vertical, low-angle shot of the Cape Byron Lighthouse perched atop a steep, grassy headland against a clear, gradient blue sky. The lighthouse features a white cylindrical tower with a black lantern housing and gallery, connected to a smaller white annex building with castellated details. A paved pathway with white safety railings winds up the left side of the frame along the cliff edge, where several small figures of people can be seen walking. The cliff face below the lighthouse is rugged, covered in dark rocks and tussocky coastal grass. To the right, the deep blue expanse of the Pacific Ocean stretches to the horizon. The lighting is warm and directional, likely from the late afternoon sun, illuminating the structure and the western face of the slope.

details.description: A vertical photograph capturing the Cape Byron Lighthouse situated on a steep, grassy, and rocky headland. The lighthouse is a white cylindrical tower featuring a dark-colored gallery and a white lantern room topped with a weather vane. Attached to its base is a smaller white building with crenelated parapets, characteristic of its architectural style. White-railed walking paths and staircases wind up the hillside toward the structure. In the background, the calm blue waters of the Pacific Ocean meet a clear, gradient sky. The warm, low-angled light suggests the photo was taken during the golden hour, either near sunrise or sunset.

entities.notes: Active lighthouse on Cape Byron, first lit in 1901. White cylindrical masonry/concrete tower with balcony and lantern; tower height about 22 m with a focal height around 118 m above sea level. details.description: A coastal scene featuring the Cape Byron Lighthouse perched on a grassy, rocky headland. The white cylindrical lighthouse with a lantern room sits atop a mound of vegetation, with a stone stairway and white railing winding up from the left. The sea is calm to the right and a clear blue sky dominates the background. A few visitors stand near the base of the lighthouse, enjoying the view. The overall composition centers on the lighthouse as a prominent maritime landmark, with the cliff and ocean forming a natural shoreline.

details.description: A white cylindrical lighthouse with a black gallery ring and a glass lantern sits atop a steep rocky headland above the ocean. The tower rises from a low, castellated white base building typical of historic Australian lighthouses. A pedestrian walkway with white railings leads up to the structure, with visitors along the path. The scene is lit by warm low-angle light (likely late afternoon), with clear skies and expansive sea views. A small lookout platform is visible on the lower right along the cliff.

details.description: A white cylindrical lighthouse stands on a grassy coastal headland, with a domed lantern room and glass-walled gallery. A white, crenellated base structure sits at the pedestal, and a paved staircase and railing lead up a slope to the lighthouse. The scene faces a calm blue sea on the right under a clear blue sky; warm sunlight casts gentle shadows on the tower and hillside. The rocky cliff edge drops toward the water, with low vegetation covering the slope.

details.description: A vertical shot of the Cape Byron Lighthouse, a historic white tower with a black lantern room, perched atop a steep, grassy, and rocky headland. The lighthouse features a cylindrical tower and an attached white annex building. A paved walking path with white railings winds up the hill on the left side, where small figures of people can be seen. To the right, the deep blue Pacific Ocean stretches to the horizon. The sky is a clear, gradient blue, and the lighting suggests late afternoon, casting a warm glow on the grassy slopes.

details.description: A prominent white lighthouse with a circular tower and a distinctive crenelated base, reminiscent of a small castle. It features a dark-colored gallery railing and a white lantern room with a domed roof and a weather vane. The structure is situated on a steep, grassy, and rocky headland overlooking the sea. A pedestrian walkway with white railings and stairs leads up the slope toward the lighthouse. The scene is captured under a clear, deep blue sky during the golden hour, with soft light illuminating the side of the tower. The ocean is visible in the background to the right.
